name: marketing
description: Marketing-site tooling for Claude Code. Its /marketing:site-audit command audits a live website across four dimensions and proposes fixes: SEO best practices, AI-agent discoverability (structured data / JSON-LD, GEO/AEO), HTTP security headers + TLS, and link/redirect health. Crawls the rendered, published HTML once as ground truth and gives platform-specific fix guidance via Webflow and Squarespace adapters. Use to review a site's SEO, schema.org markup, robots/sitemap, security headers, certificates, and broken/redirecting links. Do not use for Core Web Vitals / performance audits, application-level pentesting, sites requiring authenticated crawling, or to write changes back to the live site.
